title: Invalid mapping of ASAP7 FFs
body:
### Yosys version

Yosys 0.53 (git sha1 53c22ab7c, g++ 15.1.1 -fPIC -O3)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Problem

As noticed by @povik, there's an [issue with how Yosys handles input vs output inversion](https://github.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD-flow-scripts/pull/3215#issuecomment-2960758173).
See the entire thread in https://github.com/The-OpenROAD-Project/OpenROAD-flow-scripts/pull/3215 for more context.
I'm not very familiar with this, so I'm unable to provide a better description. 
Reporting this so it doesn't get lost.
